name: Prompting Essentials, Cambium Academy Course 02
description: Completed the full learning path of Cambium Academy Course 02: the narrated lecture, all 24 flashcards, all three hands-on AI Lab stations, and a 20-question quiz passed at 70% or better. Approximately 3 instructional hours. July 2026 curriculum snapshot with public sources.

criteria.narrative: Watch or read the full lecture; clear all 24 flashcards (flip required before marking); explore the persona, prompt workbench, and smuggled-instruction stations in the AI Lab; then pass the 20-question quiz at 70% or better. The quiz stays locked until every prior step is complete. Certificates are issued once per quiz pass and carry a verification ID and QR.
